timetable.exceptional: Bool M: if this timetable pattern is exceptional or regular
timetable.key: String M: key to find the pattern inside timetable
timetable.label: String M: displayed name of the pattern
timetable.info: String O: description or information about the pattern
timetable.icon: String O: icon of the pattern

services.key: String M: key to find the service type
services.level: Int M: ordering level of the service
services.variant: list<String> M: list of key variant that are equivalent to this service but designant slightly different path
services.color: String M: main color of the service
services.icon: String M: icon of the service
